mapper.insert: INSERT INTO holdings (user_id, account_id, stock_code, quantity, fractional_qty, avg_buy_price, krw_cost_basis, currency) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accountId}, #{stockCode}, #{qty}, #{fractionalDelta}, #{price}, #{krwAmount}, #{currency}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE avg_buy_price = (quantity * avg_buy_price + #{qty} * #{price}) / (quantity + #{qty}), krw_cost_basis = krw_cost_basis + #{krwAmount}, fractional_qty = fractional_qty + #{fractionalDelta}, quantity = quantity + #{qty}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, account_id, stock_code, quantity, fractional_qty, avg_buy_price, currency, created_at, updated_at FROM holdings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND quantity > 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT id, user_id, account_id, stock_code, quantity, fractional_qty, avg_buy_price, currency, created_at, updated_at FROM holdings WHERE quantity > 0 ORDER BY id

SELECT id, user_id, account_id, stock_code, quantity, fractional_qty, held_whole, held_fractional, avg_buy_price, currency, created_at, updated_at FROM holdings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND stock_code = #{stockCode}
SELECT DISTINCT stock_code FROM holdings WHERE quantity > 0
